summary: 0.6.66 is a narrow CUA input slice: add right-stick up/down volume bumps as one-shot excursions while leaving the current horizontal image/video transport behavior alone.
operatorSignals: 0.6.65 was confirmed good on slideshow timing and scrub-jump dropdowns.
The next requested seam was specifically joystick volume bumps, with no appetite for widening back into transport experiments.
actionsTaken: Added a tiny right-stick vertical volume-bump latch in the CUA input module.
Reused the existing absolute player volume setter instead of adding a new transport primitive.
Left horizontal image/video controls, slideshow timing, and sync logic untouched.
nonGoals: No default-preset autoload fix in this slice.
No movie transport, image slideshow, sync, or plugin UI redesign changes.
